parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO social_media_posts (
  post_id,
  post_slug,
  post_title,
  post_url,
  twitter_posted,
  linkedin_posted,
  facebook_posted,
  posted_at,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Set: Extract Post Data').item.json.post_id }}',
  '{{ $('Set: Extract Post Data').item.json.post_slug }}',
  '{{ $('Set: Extract Post Data').item.json.post_title }}',
  '{{ $('Set: Extract Post Data').item.json.post_url }}',
  true,
  true,
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
